questions.label: How should completed report-prep receipts be surfaced?
What filing cadence applies to this client?
What active book window should remain editable/reviewable?
Does this client need payroll review scheduling?
questions.hint: Required when employees exist in the client book.

questions.label: Which sales-tax jurisdictions need liability review?
questions.hint: Optional until a taxable jurisdiction is known.

questions.label: Which recurring reports should enter the approval queue?
questions.hint: Every generated job still requires approval before execution.
